历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 11747 → 11489 → 10678 → 11267 → 12881, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, it shifted backward by about 1614 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 12881. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Gansu Province was 28 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 38 in 2024, and to 40 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 54 students, an increase of 14 students (+35%) compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 75th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2026), with stable rankings in the 70–75 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 institutions; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant positive or negative public opinion incidents; its popularity on Douyin platform has not entered the top 100, with overall attention being average, not significantly affecting application enthusiasm; the university is characterized by geology, resources, and environment, with strong related disciplines, attracting some candidates interested in specific professional directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as mining and geological engineering have average social popularity, while popular majors like computer science and artificial intelligence have higher rankings in the university's admissions; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Province college entrance examination is approximately 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (approximately 179,817), with an estimated 147,623 Physics Category candidates, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Gansu candidates, with some regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu Province is about 2.3% (2025), at a medium level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 12881, the significant 35% expansion in 2026 reducing competition, the approximately 21.6% increase in the total number of candidates in the province intensifying competition, and other factors, along with corrections for competition pressure from candidate growth, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 15196, with a range of 14696–15696.
